\tzpentry{ID5666}{Mech Field Strength Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5666 introduces Mech Field Strength Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ F_{\mathrm{mech}} = -\nabla_d \biggl[-\frac{\mu_0}{4\pi}\frac{(\boldsymbol{\mu}_1\cdot\boldsymbol{\mu}_2) - 3(\boldsymbol{\mu}_1\cdot \hat d)(\boldsymbol{\mu}_2\cdot \hat d)}{d^3}\biggr] = \frac{3\mu_0}{2\pi}\frac{\boldsymbol{\mu}_1\cdot\boldsymbol{\mu}_2 - 2(\boldsymbol{\mu}_1\cdot \hat d)(\boldsymbol{\mu}_2\cdot \hat d)}{d^4}, \]
